assertions.description: The element-level font-feature-settings property is supported (the descriptor mirrors this).
Inserting a @font-face rule that includes the font-feature-settings descriptor through CSSOM should not be rejected.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();s.replaceSync('@font-face { font-family: t; src: url(data:,); font-feature-settings: "liga" 1; }');return s.cssRules.length>0;}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: font-variation-settings is still supported as a related typography knob.
getComputedStyle returns a font-feature-settings string when set inline; the descriptor takes effect through this same shape at the element level.
CSSFontFaceRule is exposed; this is the CSSOM type that backs @font-face rules where the descriptor lives.
